title: Claude + NotebookLM: Ultimate AI Automation Workflow to Work 10x Faster
summary: A tutorial demonstrating three automated workflows that combine Claude and Google's NotebookLM to generate YouTube scripts, podcasts, slides, and infographics from source documents. The workflow leverages Claude's Cowork feature and NotebookLM's Gemini 3.5 Flash backend to create multi-format content in minutes without coding.
writeup: This AI Master tutorial walks through three automated workflows that pair Claude with Google's NotebookLM to turn source documents into multi-format content: YouTube scripts, podcasts, slides, and infographics. The setup relies on Claude's Cowork feature and NotebookLM's Gemini 3.5 Flash backend, producing output in minutes without coding. The takeaway is a no-code pipeline for generating several content formats from the same input material.
